examples: The inefficiency of the distribution system has led to the loss of millions of tons of food.
Every office has its share of favoritism, inefficiency and dumb decisions.
Immersive reading, by contrast, depends on being willing to risk inefficiency, goallessness, even time-wasting.
Part of that is simply by getting rid of inefficiency that is rampant in places like 10B.
But inefficiency may be a much more powerful part of the problem than we realize.
